zh.lifeSummary: 當Lancelin II de Beaugency於大約1040年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特時，他的父親Lancelin Ier de Beaugency seigneur de la Flèche36歲，母親Paule du Maine31歲。他與Alberge du Maine結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1098年9月24日在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在法國。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lancelin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a pet form of the personal name   Ancel  . Compare   Asselin   2.

variants.name: Ancel
meanings: Very common Spanish boy's name (pronounced with a hard g and the stress on the second syllable), a vernacular derivative (via Latin) of Greek angelos, which meant ‘messenger’ in classical Greek, but in New Testament Greek acquired the specialized sense ‘messenger of God’, i.e. an angel. It is common in the U.S. In Britain it is now almost exclusively a girl's name, but it was used occasionally as a boy's name from the 1400s, if not earlier. As such it is familiar as the name of Angel Clare , the chief male character in Thomas Hardy's novel Tess of the D'Urbervilles ( 1891 ).

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Lancelin II de Beaugency was born about 1040, in Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Lancelin Ier de Beaugency seigneur de la Flèche, was 36 and his mother, Paule du Maine, was 31. He married Alberge du Maine. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 24 September 1098, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lancelin II de Beaugency est né environ 1040, à Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Lancelin Ier de Beaugency seigneur de la Flèche, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Paule du Maine, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Alberge du Maine. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 24 septembre 1098, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lancelin II de Beaugency um 1040 in Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lancelin Ier de Beaugency seigneur de la Flèche 36 und seine Mutter Paule du Maine 31. Er hat Alberge du Maine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 24. September 1098 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lancelin II de Beaugency è nato il circa 1040 nel Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, il suo padre, Lancelin Ier de Beaugency seigneur de la Flèche, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Paule du Maine, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Alberge du Maine. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 24 settembre 1098, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Francia.

ko.lifeSummary: Lancelin II de Beaugency(이)가 대략 1040년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lancelin Ier de Beaugency seigneur de la Flèche(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Paule du Maine(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Alberge du Maine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1098년 9월 24일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lancelin II de Beaugency nasceu aproximadamente 1040, em Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Lancelin Ier de Beaugency seigneur de la Flèche, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Paule du Maine, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Alberge du Maine. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de setembro de 1098, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lancelin II de Beaugency родился около 1040 г. в местности сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Lancelin Ier de Beaugency seigneur de la Flèche было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Paule du Maine, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Alberge du Maine. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 24 сентября 1098 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lancelin II de Beaugency nació aproximadamente 1040, en Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Lancelin Ier de Beaugency seigneur de la Flèche, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Paule du Maine, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Alberge du Maine. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 24 de septiembre de 1098, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Francia.
